Match phone/CapCut encoding to reduce Instagram re-encoding severity

Replace metadata stripping with iPhone-like metadata (Core Media handlers,
isom brand) since blank metadata is a stronger automation signal. Add keyframe
interval (-g 60), maxrate cap (8M), proper bufsize (16M), force 48kHz audio,
and bump audio bitrate to 256-320k to match consumer editor output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Optimize login speed: parallel AppShell queries, pre-set club cookie, loading skeleton

- Parallelize all 7 AppShell DB queries into single Promise.all (was 3 sequential rounds)
- Pre-set club cookie during login to skip middleware redirect loop
- Add root loading.tsx skeleton for instant visual feedback after redirect
- Rewrite login form with React 19 useActionState for immediate spinner feedback
- Wire up onPlayerClick in PipelineCard for mobile card navigation
- Clean up unused imports and lint warnings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Add capability transfer without CAP_TASK_MGMT

sys_cap_transfer(dest, caps) (syscall 93) lets any task delegate
capabilities it holds to another task. Unlike sys_grant_cap, this
does not require CAP_TASK_MGMT, enabling services to dynamically
share their own capabilities with clients.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Polish SVG seal, boost faint elements, improve a11y and video perf

SVG Quality:
- Revert SealSVG bottom arc to standard seal typography convention
  (text faces center on bottom half, reads L→R clockwise — standard
  for official seals)
- Boost SealSVG inner elements for light bg: dashed circle (0.15→0.25),
  notches (0.25→0.35), inner diamond (0.3→0.4, fill 0.03→0.04)
- Boost triangle center dashed ring (0.15→0.25)

Accessibility:
- Add aria-hidden to hero video (decorative background)
- Add role="separator" aria-hidden to TerminalDivider components
- Add contextual aria-labels to service "Consultar" links
  (e.g. "Consultar sobre Talleres de Reflexión Profunda")
- Add Spanish "(abre en nueva pestaña)" aria-labels to social links

Performance:
- Change hero video preload="auto" → preload="metadata" to avoid
  eager 10MB download on mobile connections

commit.message:
Fix duplicate lead notifications, faster call greeting, fix watcher

Notifications:
- Remove leadReminders dedup bypass — was letting 15+ duplicate notifications through
- Add 10-minute lead dedup in website webhook (same email/phone = same lead)

Call greeting speed:
- TRULY parallel init: OpenAI WS connects while context fetches (was sequential)
- Grace period 1.5s → 0.8s — greeting streams immediately, don't block
- Context fetch timeout 3s → 2s (runs parallel now)

Voice chat:
- VAD eagerness low → medium for faster response detection
- Silence duration 1.6s → 1s, prefix padding 400ms → 300ms
- Post-response unmute delay 900ms → 350ms

Watcher:
- Stash before git pull (not after) — prevents rebase failures from unstaged changes

Backend:
- Parallel context loading in aria chat (5 queries concurrent via Promise.allSettled)

commit.message:
feat: 고도화 — SEO 자동 최적화, 스마트 재시도, 카테고리 성과 분석

1. SEO 자동 최적화 통합
   - 상품 등록 시 optimizeProductTitle + generateSearchTags 자동 적용
   - 노이즈 제거(무료배송, 특가 등), 100자 제한, 검색 태그 10개 생성
   - DB에 optimizedName, searchTags 저장

2. 스마트 재시도 시스템 (retry-strategy)
   - exposure_blocked → 5~10% 가격 인하 후 30초 후 자동 재등록
   - price_not_competitive → 경쟁가 -100원 자동 조정
   - 최대 3회 재시도, margin_blocked 등은 재시도 불가
   - TDD: 19개 테스트

3. 카테고리별 성과 분석 (category-performance)
   - Revenue 40% + Orders 30% + Margin 20% + Daily 10% 가중 점수
   - rankCategories, getRecommendedCategories 순수 함수
   - API: GET /analytics/category-performance?days=30
   - TDD: 16개 테스트

commit.message:
Fix white screen + broken hamburger after sector transitions

- Don't set gameState='playing' until countdown finishes (was running
  full physics during intro/countdown, causing ghost sector completions)
- Always reset throttle/throttleSmooth on sector transitions (was only
  reset on full game restart, leftover boost caused hyper-speed during
  intro screen)
- Hide design-viewer and inventory-picker in initializeFlight (were
  persisting across sector transitions)
- Remove stale sector-intro-splash on init (safety cleanup)
- Use single shared WebGL renderer for spinning previews instead of 3
  separate ones (avoids mobile WebGL context limits)
- Block touch/mouse input during 'loading' state

健康診断で発見した6件の問題を修正:
- 全4エージェント定義のActive Modulesに未記載だった6モジュールを追加
- shigoto-nekoの完了ゲートにProcess Weight条件分岐を統合

- quality.mdの存在しないcompletion-gates.mdへのリンクを修正

* fix: 横展開で発見した「4-aspect」残留5箇所を修正

/simplify レビューで発見:
- kurouto-neko.md: "Score 4 aspects" → "Score 5 aspects"
- architecture.md: 2箇所の "4-aspect rubric" → "5-aspect rubric"
- rules/review-protocol.md: "4-aspect structured judgment" → "5-aspect"

* docs: スケーリング表の判定基準精緻化（小隊/中隊の複雑度軸追加）

x-auto-botリファクタ（4ファイル・単純移動）に中隊投入→過剰と判明。
ファイル数だけでなく設計判断の有無を中隊発動条件に追加。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: checklist_exportモジュール追加（完了ゲートチェックリストの外部ファイル出力）

完了ゲートのチェックリストを外部ファイルに出力し、人間が確認・記録として
残せるようにするモジュール。しつけ機能で ON/OFF 制御可能。
出力パスはプロジェクトのCLAUDE.mdで設定（デフォルト: {project}/_checklist/）。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: ホワイトボード作成の強制化（出撃前ハードゲート導入）

ホワイトボードが実運用で作成されなかった根本原因3点を修正:
1. 親方猫の条件分岐による省略 → 中隊以上は無条件必須に
2. 仕事猫のトリガーが親方猫の指示依存 → 出撃前ハードゲート（4項目チェックリスト）に変更
3. パス不一致（multi-agent-neko/status/ vs C:/work/whiteboard/） → WHITEBOARD_DIR変数で統一

commit.message:
feat: on_start 自动订阅行情，无需 UI 手动输入股票代码

问题：CTA engine 的 init_strategy() 只在合约已预注册时才调用
gateway.subscribe()，否则静默失败，导致策略收不到 tick 推送。

修复：新增 _force_subscribe() 方法，在 on_start() 开头调用。
  - 若合约已存在 → 取 contract.gateway_name 订阅（重启续用）
  - 若合约未注册 → 遍历已连接 gateway 动态注册（新品种首次接入）
  - gateway.subscribe() 内部会同时完成：
      ① 动态创建 ContractData 并注册到主引擎
      ② 向 kabu WebSocket 服务器发送 /register 订阅请求

效果：
  - 策略启动 = 自动订阅，无需在行情面板手动输入代码回车
  - 任意新增品种无需提前写入 KABU_STOCK_CONTRACTS
  - 重启后 WS 推送自动恢复

commit.message:
vterm: OPT-13 text wrapping cache + optimization analysis

## Summary
Implemented OPT-13 (text wrapping caching) to eliminate redundant text
wrapping calculations for identical content/width combinations.

## Changes
- **Text wrapping cache (OPT-13)**: Added frame-scoped cache for wrapText()
  results keyed by (content, width, whiteSpace). Enabled at start of each
  layout pass, cleared after layout completes.
  - Files: src/core/layout/text-wrapper.ts, src/core/layout/tree.ts
  - Impact: Eliminates redundant text wrapping for repeated content

- **OPT-12 analysis**: Attempted flexbox allocation reduction but found that
  modern JS engines optimize map/reduce very efficiently. Allocation is not
  the real bottleneck - the flexbox algorithm itself is O(N) per line.

## Test Results
- All 79 performance tests passing ✅
- Full suite: 664 pass, 2 pre-existing failures
- Zero regressions introduced

## Performance
Current baselines:
- Medium app (80×24, ~60 nodes): 0.276ms total
- Large app (220×50, ~200 nodes): 0.814ms total
- Flex grid (16×16, 256 items): 1.503ms total

## Files Modified
- src/core/layout/text-wrapper.ts - Added cache + enable/clear functions
- src/core/layout/tree.ts - Call enableWrapCache/clearWrapCache around layout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(milkdrop): fix rotation accumulation bug and enhance warp effect

Rotation was using += to accumulate the angle, causing it to grow
unbounded and destroy the image within seconds. Changed to per-frame
delta since the feedback loop naturally compounds rotation.

Also increased default warp_intensity from 0.5 to 1.5 and added a slow
sine oscillation (±50%) so the warp breathes organically over time.

commit.message:
Fix empty state dropdown: add CamelCase JSON naming policy to backend

ASP.NET Core was serializing responses with PascalCase property names
(e.g. Data, Errors) while Angular expected camelCase (data, errors).
This caused all API responses to be silently misread, leaving signals
like states=[] and dropdowns empty.

Add Resources, Prompts, and Sessions support for complete MCP implementation (#5)

Implements the three missing MCP features to achieve full feature parity:

- Resources: --list-resources, --list-resource-templates, --read-resource URI
- Prompts: --list-prompts, --get-prompt NAME, --prompt-arg KEY=VALUE
- Sessions: --session-start NAME, --session-stop NAME, --session-list, --session NAME
  (background daemon with Unix domain socket IPC for persistent connections)

All features work across stdio and HTTP transports, and through sessions.
27 tests pass covering resources, prompts, sessions, and existing tool functionality.

Railway, all /api/* requests are now proxied through Vercel via Next.js
rewrites. This completely avoids CORS since the browser only talks to
the same origin.

commit.message:
fix: persist last_error for trackers that timeout on Modal (#290)

When a tracker_process_repo Modal container times out (600s), the
container is killed before process_tracker's exception handler can
write last_error. The orchestrator caught the FunctionTimeoutError
but never persisted it to the database, making the failure invisible.

Now _dispatch_changed_trackers tracks which tracker IDs returned a
result dict, and after fn.map completes, updates last_error for any
orphaned trackers whose containers died silently.

Closes #289

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: increase Tempo submitQuiz gas limit to 1.5M for MetaMask compatibility

Tempo testnet (TIP-1000) charges 5-10x more gas than standard EVM.
300k was sufficient for OKX wallet (overrides gas) but not MetaMask.

commit.message:
feat: persist pending Courier state in vault for cold-start recovery (#95)

Ephemeral agent keys and poison phrases were stored only in-memory,
causing receive_credentials to fail after a Horizon process recycle.
Now open_channel persists pending state to the vault, and receive
restores it on in-memory miss, enabling seamless cold-start recovery.

commit.message:
feat(experts): proactive fallback for degraded expert roles (#1401)

When an expert role has >= 3 consecutive trailing failures in the
outcome store, proactively skip to the fallback chain instead of
attempting the primary CLI first. This avoids wasting time on known-bad
routing and recovers faster from sustained failures (e.g., security
expert at 31.8% with rate_limit as dominant error).
